# Version 3.119.0
> **First SkiaSharp 3.x stable release** · Released April 25, 2025 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.0) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.0)
> **Supersedes [3.118.0](3.118.0.md)** · Rolls up preview-only work that was never released as stable — those changes are included cumulatively below.
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.0/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.119.0 is the first stable 3.x release, built on Skia m119 with new architectures, D3D on Windows and SkCanvas.SaveLayerRec. It rolls up the 3.118.0 previews (Skia m117/m118, HarfBuzz 8.3.1, libexpat 2.6.4, libjpeg-turbo, FreeType) and then bumps to Skia m119, adds Direct3D on Windows, `SkCanvas.SaveLayerRec` and the missing `SKColorFilter` types, extends Linux support with riscv64 and LoongArch64, and lands a stack of Metal, tvOS and Windows ARM fixes.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Engine

- **Skia bumped through m117, m118 and m119** — Three upstream engine bumps land the m117 baseline, m118 preview and the m119 stable milestone that names the release. ([#3047](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3047), [#3048](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3048), [#3062](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3062))
- **Native dependencies refreshed** — Bumps HarfBuzz to 8.3.1, libexpat to 2.6.4, libpng to 1.6.44, libjpeg-turbo to the 2.1.5.1+commits snapshot and FreeType to 2.13.3+ to pick up upstream fixes. ([#3052](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3052), [#3056](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3056), [#3059](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3059), [#3060](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3060), [#3061](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3061))
- **Vulkan Memory Allocator updated to 3.2.1** — Refreshes the bundled Vulkan Memory Allocator so the Vulkan backend picks up the latest fixes. — ❤️ [@kasperk81](https://github.com/kasperk81) ([#3196](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3196))
- **Unused externals pruned and CVE-2024-30105 addressed** — Disables and removes a set of unused or problematic externals so the shipping surface stays lean, and rolls dependencies to address CVE-2024-30105. — ❤️ [@pjcollins](https://github.com/pjcollins) ([#3150](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3150), [#3171](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3171), [#3180](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3180), [#3166](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3166))

## API Surface

- **Direct3D on Windows** — Compiles Skia with the Direct3D backend on Windows so applications can render through D3D in addition to OpenGL and ANGLE. — ❤️ [@Kation](https://github.com/Kation) ([#2823](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2823))
- **SkCanvas.SaveLayerRec** — Exposes `SkCanvas::SaveLayerRec` so callers can create save layers with the full set of `SkRect`, backdrop filter, image filter and layer-flag options. — ❤️ [@ahmed605](https://github.com/ahmed605) ([#2962](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2962))
- **Missing SKColorFilter types filled in** — Adds the color-filter types that were still missing from the managed surface so the color-filter API matches upstream Skia. ([#2882](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2882))
- **Metal APIs on GRBackendRenderTarget across all platforms** — Exposes the Metal-backed `GRBackendRenderTarget` constructors on every Apple TFM so Metal render targets can be created uniformly from iOS, tvOS, macOS and Mac Catalyst. — ❤️ [@spouliot](https://github.com/spouliot) ([#3070](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3070))
- **SKMetalView on tvOS** — Extends the Metal `SKMetalView` control to tvOS so tvOS apps get the same accelerated view as iOS and Mac Catalyst. — ❤️ [@MartinZikmund](https://github.com/MartinZikmund) ([#3114](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3114))

## Bug Fixes

- **SKImage.FromPicture implementation corrected** — Fixes `SKImage.FromPicture` so pictures rasterize into images correctly instead of silently returning wrong content. ([#3231](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3231))
- **.NET Framework/Mono `packages.config` regression fixed** — Fixes a regression that broke projects consuming SkiaSharp via `packages.config` on .NET Framework and Mono. — ❤️ [@sungaila](https://github.com/sungaila) ([#3112](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3112))
- **iOS Simulator Metal performance restored** — Restores Metal performance on the iOS Simulator that had regressed with the earlier Metal backend changes. — ❤️ [@taublast](https://github.com/taublast) ([#3156](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3156))
- **ASP.NET Blazor on .NET 9 works again** — Fixes the WASM import path so SkiaSharp loads correctly from Blazor apps hosted under a base path, moves the workaround into the SkiaSharp WASM assets and pins the Windows SDK version deterministically. ([#3064](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3064), [#3082](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3082), [#3088](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3088), [#3092](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3092), [#3085](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3085))
- **tvOS targets corrected and Apple-only code fenced** — Sets the correct target for tvOS, ships the tvOS external fixes and excludes code that will never run on Apple platforms from the Apple builds. ([#3186](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3186), [#3187](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3187), [#3199](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3199))
- **PackagePath attribute corrected** — Uses the correct `PackagePath` attribute so the packaged assets land in the expected NuGet layout. ([#3100](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3100))

## Platform

- **riscv64 and LoongArch64 Linux support** — Adds native build support for `linux-riscv64` and `linux-loongarch64`, and extends `clang-cross` to support Alpine so the Linux binaries cover more architectures. — ❤️ [@kasperk81](https://github.com/kasperk81), [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3192](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3192), [#3198](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3198), [#3200](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3200), [#3209](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3209))
- **Windows ARM native support** — Enables OpenGL on Windows ARM and fixes the build targets so SkiaSharp runs on ARM64 Windows machines. ([#3189](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3189), [#3190](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3190))
- **Android NDK bumped to r27c with 16 KB page alignment** — Rebuilds the Android natives on NDK r27c so SkiaSharp keeps loading on Android 15+ devices that use 16 KB memory pages. ([#3096](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3096))
- **Linux Alpine cross-compile** — Extends the `clang-cross` support to Alpine so the Alpine (musl) Linux builds share the same toolchain path. — ❤️ [@kasperk81](https://github.com/kasperk81) ([#3200](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3200))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **Incorrect internal call fixed** — Fixes an incorrect internal call in the bindings that could invoke the wrong native entry point in certain code paths. — ❤️ [@kkwpsv](https://github.com/kkwpsv) ([#3143](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3143))

## Preview 1 (March 31, 2025)

Preview 1 rolled up the entire 3.118 preview line and added the m119 engine bump, Direct3D on Windows, `SkCanvas.SaveLayerRec`, the missing `SKColorFilter` types, `SKMetalView` on tvOS, riscv64/LoongArch64/Alpine Linux support, Windows ARM support and the CI/CVE hardening that turned the line into a stable release.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.118.0-preview.2.3...v3.119.0-preview.1.2)

## Preview 2 (December 5, 2024)

Preview 2 (from the 3.118 line) stacked the m118 engine bump, rolled HarfBuzz, libexpat, libjpeg-turbo and FreeType, added the Metal `GRBackendRenderTarget` overloads across Apple platforms and fixed the .NET 9 Blazor hosting story.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.118.0-preview.1.2...v3.118.0-preview.2.3)

## Preview 1 (November 6, 2024)

Preview 1 rolled up the entire 3.118 preview line and added the m119 engine bump, Direct3D on Windows, `SkCanvas.SaveLayerRec`, the missing `SKColorFilter` types, `SKMetalView` on tvOS, riscv64/LoongArch64/Alpine Linux support, Windows ARM support and the CI/CVE hardening that turned the line into a stable release.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.116.1...v3.118.0-preview.1.2)
